name: T_QueueDecor

name: T_ObjIsVisible
notes: per-object render-flag/type visibility test (DAT_00573396 flags vs type table at 0x50A6B8); used by T_AddVisibleObjs; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _T_Make@12
notes: build terrain scene: pick LOD tile size (_lodTileSize 0x20-0x100) + detail (_lodDetail 1/2/4/8) by view distance/DAT_00573394; quadtree tessellate into _cellArray; run ambient/object passes; emit leaf list

name: T_RunAmbientProcs
notes: iterate _ambientProcs[0..0x10] (17 decoration procs) calling each with its index; gated by DAT_00573396&0x8000 and _ambientSuppress; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_AddVisibleObjs
notes: iterate _objPtrs[1.._nextObjId]; for visible in-bounds objects run ImmediateService and T_QueueDecor (via GetCurObj/PutCurObj); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_BuildQuadCell
notes: build one quad cell in _cellArray (sample T_GetLeaf at 4 corners, T_QuadAltitude/SetFlags)
Ghidra split re-entry/body of T_BuildQuadCell (0x4A9D00 +0xE); decompiles with phantom in_EAX/in_SF/in_OF (loop-back target)

name: T_QuadAltitude
notes: representative altitude of a cell (clamped min/max blend of corner heights scaled by DAT_00573392); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_QuadSetFlags
notes: set leaf flat-bit (+0xF|1) vs sloped-bit (+0xE|0x80) from corner-delta bytes; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_ViewBounds
notes: rotate view box by heading (_Rotate2) to compute cell-space AABB DAT_0057334a..DAT_00573350; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_SubdivideCells
notes: LOD pass: walk _cellArray, subdivide cells finer than _lodDetail via 4x T_BuildQuadCell; T_CellScreenBounds cull; caps at 500 cells; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_CellScreenBounds
notes: cell world extent (<<5) AND'd with view bounds via _BoundsAnd (cull test); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_CompactCells
notes: compact _cellArray dropping dead (0xffff) cells; rewrites _cellCount and optional carried index; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_SortCells
notes: in-place quicksort of _cellArray (stride 0x16) via comparator (*_cellCompare 0x580B9C) and _Swapmem; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand
empty stub (single RET); reserved ambient/sort hook invoked by T_Make after T_SortCells

name: T_CountCells
notes: tally cells into front/back counts (returns front count); drives T_Make's subdivide-again loop; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: T_EmitCells
notes: per live cell: T_CellTmapLookup + optional T_Normal, then T_LeafOp to emit geometry; signature recovered in the #453 close-out; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _T_InitDictionary@0

name: _T_NamedTmaps@0
notes: build named-tmap list (_tlist) from dictionary

name: @T_SortTmapList@0
notes: sort _tlist for binary search

name: T_CellTmapLookup
notes: binary-search _tlist by packed cell coord ((y&~3)<<16|(x&~3)) to pick the tile texture; gated by _lowMemory/_tlistSize/DAT_00573396&2; signature recovered in the #453 close-out; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _T_InitHorizonProc@0
notes: RMAccess stars.SH/moon.SH/sun.SH into _starsH/_moonH/_sunH

name: _T_HorizonProc
notes: 1-B stub in current Ghidra (single RET / proc-ptr slot); SMS underscore differs from current label; signature recovered in the #453 close-out; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

CODE misfiled as a data row: the bytes here are a function prologue / branch label, not data (verified by disassembly). Re-kinding tracked in #479. Was: default horizon descriptor (14 B) embedded after T_HorizonProc; pushed into leaf list by T_Make

name: T_DrawHorizon
notes: horizon/sky band render: _T_Info horizon sample + _WRMakeHazeList + _currentTintTable sky colors + _hackSky/_clip* extents; static, no SMS symbol; not a C function (#479): mid-function split of the routine at 0x004AACF0

name: _T_Info@24

name: _T_InitDatabase@0

name: _T_ShutdownDatabase@0

name: @T_Load@4

name: T_StripTildes
notes: remove '~' chars from a filename in place; used twice by T_Load; signature recovered in the #453 close-out; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _T_Shutdown@0

name: _T_StopAdding@0
